name: Double Fudge Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix together sifted flour, sugar, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
3. Melt butter with unsweetened chocolate until combined.
4. Add the melted mixture to the flour mixture and stir until well incorporated.
5. Beat the eggs until foamy.
6. Stir the eggs, vanilla extract, sour cream or yogurt, and chocolate chips into the batter.
7. Pour the batter into an oiled 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
8. Bake for 30 minutes. Monitor carefully as the toothpick test may not be reliable at this time.
9. Cut into 1 1/2-inch squares. Enjoy! Makes 48 brownies.
